title: RAKS Sp. z o.o. ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] RAKS Sp. z o.o. is a company based in Poland specializing in wholesale and retail trade of non-specialized products, including various types of goods such as household products, clothes, toys, and more. The company offers a wide range of products to cater to different customer needs and has built a reputation for its reliable service and quality offerings.
